entries.summary: Phase 2: UI Architecture & Design Cleanup — Restructured Sources/ into 5 subdirectories (DataSources, Views, Models, Utilities, Layouts). Deduplicated safeText() into Utilities/String+Safe.swift with targeted control character stripping. Extracted KeycapCard (206 lines) and StripedFill (19 lines) from monolithic OverlayRootView (392→152 lines). Extracted keySpecs layout grid (62 entries) into Layouts/VoyagerLayout.swift. Added ErrorState enum with onError protocol callback, ViewModel error aggregation, and error banner UI. Created DesignTokens.swift with 8 enum categories replacing all hardcoded values across views.
top_rejection_reasons: Incomplete token extraction — 3 spacing values not moved to DesignTokens (2.6)
lessons_learned: Git checkpoints before destructive file ops (2.3 reorganization) prevent disasters from bad moves
Underspecification in plans forces coders to invent design decisions — the critic caught 3 major gaps before implementation
Error banner severity precedence (error before warning) is subtle but important — caught by reviewer, fixed in 2.6
Design token extraction catches residual hardcoded values that survive initial passes — reviewer found 3 missed spacings
